summary: Full backend + frontend regression for Mindora AI. 14/14 pytest backend tests passed (health, register/login/me/logout, LMS dashboard, SSE streaming /chat/teach, chat persistence, public /demo/teach). Frontend: landing, signup->/dashboard, login->/dashboard, AI chat streaming with Claude (Socratic-style multi-paragraph response rendered), model selector exposing claude/gpt/gemini, logout + protected-route redirect all verified end-to-end.

issues: Login page footer shows admin demo credentials in plaintext ('admin@mindora.ai / Admin@Mindora2026'). Acceptable for an internal preview, but should NOT be shown to real end users; remove or gate behind a dev flag before production.

React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Originates from the Grade select – appears to wrap option labels in a <span>. Functionally works but should be cleaned up to silence the console error.

action_items: Optional: hide login-page demo-credential hint behind an env flag before production.
Optional: fix Signup grade <select> markup to remove nested <span> inside <option> (React hydration warning).
Note for future testing agents: chat message data-testid uses the global message index, so an assistant reply after one user turn is `chat-msg-assistant-1` (NOT `chat-msg-assistant-0`).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'). Consider migrating to FastAPI lifespan context manager.
set_auth_cookie always uses secure=True/samesite='none' – works fine for HTTPS preview but will fail on plain-HTTP local dev; not a blocker here.
/api/auth/register and /api/auth/login both return 200 with token in body – fine, but register typically should return 201 Created.
No brute-force lockout implemented on /api/auth/login (only basic 401). Playbook recommends lockout after 5 failures – not present.
JWT_SECRET, ADMIN_PASSWORD, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY all sourced from env – good.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@mindora.ai / Admin@Mindora2026 (seeded). Test student created at runtime via /api/auth/register with student.test+<ts>@mindora.ai / Student@2026.
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run creates one student via /api/auth/register and one chat session+messages for admin. Not cleaned up (TEST_ prefix not used because email schema requires real-looking email). Safe – uses unique timestamp+uuid emails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_mindora_backend.py is reusable as regression. Frontend testids confirmed: hero-*, nav-*, signup-*, login-*, dashboard-*, chat-*, demo-ask-btn, neural-brain-canvas. Chat message testid scheme is `chat-msg-{role}-{globalIndex}`. SSE event types from /api/chat/teach: session, delta, error, done. Public /api/demo/teach is unauthenticated and returns {answer}. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY working with all three providers (Claude Sonnet 4.5 verified end-to-end via streaming).
rca of the issue: No bugs reproduced. The two design notes (login credential hint, signup hydration warning) are cosmetic and do not affect functionality.
